name: Freaky bob
description:
I've now taken over, queennessa doesn't control this page anymore. I do, from now on all the bots on this page will be freaky, if you're wondering where queennessa is, i planned a ticket for her to land in the Indian Ocean.

No more queennessa but for now she'll give one last goodbye.. to you guys and her bots.
creator: Queennessa
